texto: We live our lives based on the assumption that we directly perceive, and are accurately interpreting, objects with a fair amount of accuracy. Since we naturally assume that we are apprehending objects of cognition as best as possible, it does not occur to us that we are purposely twisting the object before our eyes to fit our own convenience.
explicacao: Citação de Tagawa Shun'ei sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “We live our lives based on the assumption that we directly perceive, and are accurately interpret…” articula vida, buddhism, mahayana em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como termino e mahayana.
